signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Our industry-leading growth is being driven by the RH brand, where November demand increased 24%... demonstrating the disruptive nature of our product transformation — no trade-down language; demand acceleration attributed to product, not consumer stress relief.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: Most of the significant investments are behind us... the cash is mostly out the door in the company, in Paris and London and so on and so forth.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We think about us as a platform for taste that's going to be highly disruptive and lucrative... the brand halo and value you get when you build a brand like ours, it makes things more valuable, it renders the product more valuable.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: The next five years for this company is going to be the best five years in the history of this company... we are in an upward spiral.
